//: This file is the single entry point for managing all apps and packages.
It is NOT a deployable app; it only wires the workspace together and
holds shared dev-tooling (ESLint, Prettier, TypeScript, etc.).
name: expense-tracker-monorepo
// private: Prevents this root package from being accidentally published to npm.
// workspaces: Declares the workspace members to npm.
npm will hoist shared dependencies to the root node_modules and create
symlinks so each app/package can import its siblings by name.
// scripts: All scripts below delegate to the individual workspace packages via --workspace flags.
Run any script from the repo root — no need to cd into each app.

scripts.// build: Compile every workspace that declares a 'build' script (tsc for each app).
scripts.// dev: Start all backend services + the web frontend in parallel, with hot-reload.
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace=apps/gateway" "npm run dev --workspace=apps/expenses-service" "npm run dev --workspace=apps/auth-service" "npm run dev --workspace=apps/budget-service" "npm run dev --workspace=apps/notification-service" "npm run dev --workspace=apps/analytics-service" "npm run dev --workspace=apps/web"
scripts.// dev:backend: Start only the backend services (no frontend) in parallel.
scripts.dev:backend: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace=apps/gateway" "npm run dev --workspace=apps/expenses-service" "npm run dev --workspace=apps/auth-service" "npm run dev --workspace=apps/budget-service" "npm run dev --workspace=apps/notification-service" "npm run dev --workspace=apps/analytics-service"
scripts.// dev:gateway: Start only the gateway (HTTP entry-point, Swagger UI on :3000).
scripts.// dev:expenses: Start only the expenses microservice (TCP transport on :3001).
scripts.// dev:web: Start only the React frontend (Vite dev server on :5173).
scripts.// lint: Run ESLint across all TypeScript source files in apps and packages.
scripts.// lint:fix: Same as lint but auto-fix any fixable violations in place.
scripts.// format: Re-format every TypeScript file with Prettier (modifies files in place).
scripts.// format:check: Check formatting without writing — exits non-zero if any file differs (used in CI).
scripts.// clean: Delete all compiled output and local node_modules for a completely fresh install.
scripts.clean: rimraf apps/*/dist packages/*/dist apps/*/node_modules packages/*/node_modules node_modules
scripts.// docker:up: Build Docker images and start all services defined in docker-compose.yml.
scripts.// docker:down: Stop containers and remove volumes (wipes the SQLite data volume too).

// dependencies: tsconfig-paths is hoisted to the root so `npm ci --omit=dev` in each
service's production Docker stage reliably installs it at /app/node_modules,
where Node's upward module resolution will find it from any apps/<svc>/.
Without this, npm ci's per-workspace install was inconsistent across services.
// engines: Enforce minimum runtime versions so developers get a clear error instead of silent breakage.
